columns.name: csv_schema_version
columns.description: Version of this CSV contract.
columns.why_it_matters: A parser must know which columns and meanings apply.

columns.name: inventory_schema_version
columns.description: Version of the canonical corpus inventory.
columns.why_it_matters: CSV rows must build one known inventory structure.

columns.name: vocabulary_profile
columns.description: Version of the controlled vocabularies.
columns.why_it_matters: Category labels must remain reproducible across runs.

columns.name: purpose
columns.description: Research workflow selected for the corpus.
columns.why_it_matters: Purpose determines additional metadata requirements and readiness checks.

columns.name: file_label
columns.description: Exact visible label of the P003-validated TXT file.
columns.why_it_matters: Delta never uses fuzzy matching to assign scholarly metadata.

columns.name: content_sha256
columns.description: SHA-256 of the exact validated TXT bytes.
columns.why_it_matters: The metadata must describe the bytes that passed secure intake.

columns.name: asset_id
columns.description: Stable scholarly identifier for the analyzed TXT asset.
columns.why_it_matters: The analyzed file and its rights layers need a durable identity.

columns.name: work_id
columns.description: Stable identifier for one independent work.
columns.why_it_matters: One analyzed TXT represents one independent work in v0.1.

columns.name: title_original
columns.description: Title in its original language.
columns.why_it_matters: The original title is the canonical human-readable work identity.

columns.name: title_english
columns.description: Optional English display title.
columns.why_it_matters: An English label can aid navigation without replacing the original title.

columns.name: language
columns.description: Language of the analyzed text.
columns.why_it_matters: Language affects tokenization, comparison, and interpretation.

columns.name: primary_author_id
columns.description: Stable identifier for the primary author-role contributor.
columns.why_it_matters: Authorship must remain explicit even for anonymous or unknown works.

columns.name: primary_author_name
columns.description: Display name for the primary author-role contributor.
columns.why_it_matters: A readable name accompanies the stable identifier.

columns.name: primary_author_kind
columns.description: Whether the author is a person, collective, anonymous, or unknown.
columns.why_it_matters: Anonymous and uncertain authorship must not be represented as a named person.

columns.name: primary_author_authorities_json
columns.description: Optional VIAF, Wikidata, ISNI, ORCID, or other identifiers; use [] when absent.
columns.why_it_matters: Authority identifiers improve interoperability without being mandatory.

columns.name: additional_contributors_json
columns.description: Additional authors, editors, translators, adapters, or compilers; use [] when absent.
columns.why_it_matters: Multiple contributors and their roles must survive CSV round trips.

columns.name: first_publication_mode
columns.description: Certainty mode for first publication.
columns.why_it_matters: Delta preserves uncertainty instead of inventing a precise year.

columns.name: first_publication_start_year
columns.description: Single year, or start of a range, for first publication.
columns.why_it_matters: Style Over Time orders works by work history rather than edition date.

columns.name: first_publication_end_year
columns.description: End year when first_publication_mode is range.
columns.why_it_matters: Ranges must remain ranges rather than false point estimates.

columns.name: first_publication_label
columns.description: Optional human-readable date note.
columns.why_it_matters: A label can preserve a source's wording or uncertainty note.

columns.name: group_label
columns.description: Explicit group used by Group Comparison.
columns.why_it_matters: Grouping must be declared by the researcher rather than inferred silently.

columns.name: genre_value
columns.description: Normalized genre value.
columns.why_it_matters: Genre can confound stylistic distance and must be auditable.

columns.name: genre_label
columns.description: Display label for genre_value.
columns.why_it_matters: The researcher's wording remains visible beside the normalized value.

columns.name: genre_kind
columns.description: Controlled, custom, unknown, or not-applicable genre state.
columns.why_it_matters: An empty cell must not masquerade as a scholarly assertion.

columns.name: audience_value
columns.description: Normalized intended-audience value.
columns.why_it_matters: Audience can confound apparent style differences.

columns.name: audience_label
columns.description: Display label for audience_value.
columns.why_it_matters: The visible label documents what the normalized value means.

columns.name: audience_kind
columns.description: Controlled, custom, unknown, or not-applicable audience state.
columns.why_it_matters: Uncertainty remains explicit in charts and reports.

columns.name: adaptation_value
columns.description: Normalized adaptation status.
columns.why_it_matters: Adaptation and translation can affect the language being measured.

columns.name: adaptation_label
columns.description: Display label for adaptation_value.
columns.why_it_matters: The label keeps the category readable.

columns.name: adaptation_kind
columns.description: Controlled, custom, unknown, or not-applicable adaptation state.
columns.why_it_matters: Unknown adaptation status remains a visible limitation.

columns.name: collection_value
columns.description: Normalized collection or publication context.
columns.why_it_matters: Anthology items and serial installments may not be independent in the same way.

columns.name: collection_label
columns.description: Display label for collection_value.
columns.why_it_matters: The normalized context remains human-readable.

columns.name: collection_kind
columns.description: Controlled, custom, unknown, or not-applicable collection state.
columns.why_it_matters: Unknown publication context remains explicit.

columns.name: edition_id
columns.description: Stable identifier for the analyzed edition assertion.
columns.why_it_matters: The analyzed edition is distinct from the abstract work.

columns.name: edition_label
columns.description: Readable description of the analyzed edition.
columns.why_it_matters: Edition choice can affect apparent stylistic features.

columns.name: edition_date_mode
columns.description: Certainty mode for the analyzed edition date.
columns.why_it_matters: Edition chronology must not silently replace first-publication chronology.

columns.name: edition_date_start_year
columns.description: Single year, or start of a range, for the analyzed edition.
columns.why_it_matters: Edition timing is a potential corpus confound.

columns.name: edition_date_end_year
columns.description: End year when edition_date_mode is range.
columns.why_it_matters: Uncertain edition dates must remain explicit intervals.

columns.name: edition_date_label
columns.description: Optional human-readable edition-date note.
columns.why_it_matters: A label can retain the source's wording.

columns.name: edition_citation
columns.description: Bibliographic citation for the analyzed edition.
columns.why_it_matters: A citation makes the edition assertion independently inspectable.
columns.example: Collodi, Carlo. Le avventure di Pinocchio.

columns.name: source_id
columns.description: Stable identifier for the acquisition source.
columns.why_it_matters: Source provenance and rights evidence must point to one known source.

columns.name: source_type_value
columns.description: Normalized source type.
columns.why_it_matters: Source type helps audit edition and transcription risks.

columns.name: source_type_label
columns.description: Display label for source_type_value.
columns.why_it_matters: The source classification remains readable.

columns.name: source_type_kind
columns.description: Controlled, custom, unknown, or not-applicable source-type state.
columns.why_it_matters: Uncertain source classification must not be silently normalized.

columns.name: source_title
columns.description: Readable title of the source or repository record.
columns.why_it_matters: A URL alone is not sufficient human-readable provenance.

columns.name: source_url
columns.description: Web location of the source when available.
columns.why_it_matters: A source URL supports inspection and reacquisition.

columns.name: source_bibliographic_citation
columns.description: Bibliographic source evidence; required when no URL is present.
columns.why_it_matters: Every source needs inspectable evidence even when it is offline.

columns.name: source_accessed_on
columns.description: Date on which source_url was accessed.
columns.why_it_matters: Online source records can change over time.

columns.name: normalization_profile
columns.description: Declared text-normalization profile.
columns.why_it_matters: Text preparation can change stylometric features.

columns.name: normalization_notes
columns.description: Description required for a custom normalization profile.
columns.why_it_matters: A custom transformation must be reproducible.

columns.name: mapping_confirmed
columns.description: Human confirmation of the exact file-to-work mapping.
columns.why_it_matters: A proposed label match is not a scholarly decision.

columns.name: rights_chain_confirmed
columns.description: Human confirmation that all relevant rights layers were considered.
columns.why_it_matters: An omitted work, edition, or transcription layer could make export unsafe.

columns.name: line_count
columns.description: Optional P003 line count copied from intake.
columns.why_it_matters: A content-free count helps inspect the corpus without retaining text.

columns.name: token_count
columns.description: Optional P003 whitespace-token count copied from intake.
columns.why_it_matters: A content-free count supports corpus review and imbalance checks.

columns.name: intake_profile
columns.description: P003 resource and validation profile.
columns.why_it_matters: The accepted bytes must remain tied to the policy that checked them.

columns.name: intake_status
columns.description: Stable P003 acceptance state.
columns.why_it_matters: Metadata cannot substitute for secure intake.

columns.name: rights_sources_json
columns.description: Complete source records used only by rights layers; use [] when every rights record cites source_id.
columns.why_it_matters: A license or permission source can differ from the source of the analyzed text and must survive a CSV round trip.

columns.name: rights_records_json
columns.description: One or more complete rights-v2 records for every declared asset layer; the blank template uses [] until records are entered.
columns.why_it_matters: Upload, analysis, export, and public redistribution are separate, evidence-backed decisions.
